title: Generate IF conditional does not correctly handle constant selections

features.name: generate if with short-circuit AND and parameter constant comparison
features.description: Code should include a generate if statement with a short-circuit AND operator (&&) in the condition, where one operand is a parameter comparison against a constant value

features.name: generate if with parameter less-than constant comparison
features.description: Code should include a generate if statement with a parameter being compared to a constant hex value using less-than comparison
